title: MDU Date Sheet 2026

detail.title: MDU Date Sheet 2026
detail.short_info: MDU Date Sheet 2026 released for PG All Programs 2nd Semester Open and Foundation Elective theory exams. Check May 2026 exam schedule and download PDF at mdu.ac.in.

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University (MDU), Rohtak has officially released the MDU Date Sheet 2026 for Theory Examinations of PG All Programs 2nd Semester Open & Foundation Elective Courses scheduled in May 2026. Students pursuing postgraduate programmes can now check the complete exam schedule on the official university website – mdu.ac.in.

This MDU Date Sheet 2026 is important for all PG students appearing in Open Elective and Foundation Elective papers. Candidates are advised to download the official date sheet and prepare according to the given schedule.

Maharshi Dayanand University has published the theory date sheet for Postgraduate programmes. The MDU Date Sheet 2026 covers Open Elective and Foundation Elective courses for 2nd Semester examinations to be held in May 2026.

The MDU Date Sheet 2026 provides the detailed examination schedule for Open Elective and Foundation Elective papers across various Postgraduate programmes. Students can refer to the official notification for their specific elective subjects and important dates. The date sheet includes theory exams for 2nd Semester students.
Candidates are requested to carefully check the dates and timings mentioned in the MDU Date Sheet 2026 for smooth exam preparation.

sections.heading: How to Download MDU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the MDU Date Sheet 2026 from the official university website. Follow these simple steps to get your copy.

items: Visit the official Maharshi Dayanand University website at mdu.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examination or Date Sheet section.
Look for the latest notification titled "Theory Date Sheet PG all Programs 2nd Semester Open & Foundation Elective Exam May 2026".
Click on the date sheet link to open the PDF file.
Download and save the MDU Date Sheet 2026 on your device.
Take a printout for ready reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Students are advised to regularly check the official MDU website for any updates or changes in the MDU Date Sheet 2026.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in MDU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official MDU Date Sheet 2026 notification contains all essential information for the upcoming May 2026 examinations. Here are the key details mentioned in the document:

items: Programme: PG All Programs
Semester: 2nd Semester
Exam Type: Open Elective & Foundation Elective Courses
Examination Month: May 2026
Detailed theory exam schedule
Important instructions for students
Examination timings and guidelines.
